code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Jonga ukuba i-URL yendawo ekhankanyiweyo ingaphakathi kwesizinda esinikiweyo.
Ukuba kunjalo, buyisela i-URL yendawo yokukhokelisa; kungenjalo, yibuyisele kwi-URL yesizinda yokukhokelisa.
Sebenzisa inkqubo ye-https.

Imizekelo:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Isitshixo se-URL yendawo.
@param domain: Isitshixo sesizinda, ngaphandle kwenkqubo.

@return Isitshixo se-URL sokukhokelisa.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the target URL's domain is within the given domain.
If it is, return the target URL for redirection; otherwise, return the domain's URL for redirection.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without the protocol.

@return The redirect URL string.

    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Umgca we-URL yendawo ekujoliswe kuyo.
@param domain: Umgca wesizinda, ngaphandle kwenkqubo.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: umsebenzi wokuphumeza umyalelo we-shell kwaye ubambe umphumo wawo; umbizi unoxanduva lokukhulula inkumbulo; AKUFUNI ukwenza lo msebenzi njengoko unikezelwe kamva (kodwa wazise apha ukuze ungawusebenzisa.

Yenza isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo, usithumele ngohlobo lwe-PEM, kwaye usibuyisele njengomtya.
Iingcebiso: phumeza imiyalelo ye-shell ukuze wenze ifayile yeparamitha ye-DSA nesitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo ngolu hlobo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayile yesithuba esitempeleni yokugcina iiparamitha> <ubude besitshixo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayile yesithuba esitempeleni yokugcina iiparamitha>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukwenza igama lefayile yesithuba esitempeleni esihlukileyo kwifayile yeparamitha ye-DSA.

@return Isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo esenziweyo ngohlobo lwe-PEM, okanye NULL ukuba kwenzeke impazamo.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Execute a shell command and capture its result; the caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT perform this task as it will be provided later (but declare it here so you can use it).

Generate a private DSA key, send it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Tips: execute shell commands to create a DSA parameter file and a private DSA key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary parameter storage file> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary parameter storage file>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to generate a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated private DSA key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurs.
prompt_2_segments: umsebenzi wokuphumeza umyalelo we-shell kwaye ubambe umphumo wawo; umbizi unoxanduva lokukhulula inkumbulo; AKUFUNI ukwenza lo msebenzi njengoko unikezelwe kamva (kodwa wazise apha ukuze ungawusebenzisa).

Yenza isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo, uyithumele ngohlobo lwe-PEM, kwaye uyibuyisele njengomtya.
Iingcebiso: phumeza imiyalelo ye-shell ukuze wenze ifayile yeparamitha ye-DSA kunye nesitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo ngolu hlobo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparamitha> <ubude besitshixo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparamitha>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukwenza igama lefayile yesikhashana ehlukileyo kwifayile yeparamitha ye-DSA.

@return Isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo esenziweyo ngohlobo lwe-PEM, okanye NULL ukuba kwenzeke impazamo.

Yenza isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo, uyithumele usebenzisa ifomethi ye-PEM, kwaye uyibuyisele njengomtya.
Iingcebiso: phumeza imiyalelo ye-shell ukuze wenze ifayile yeparamitha ye-DSA kunye nesitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo ngolu hlobo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparamitha> <ubude besitshixo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparamitha>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukwenza igama lefayile yesikhashana eyahlukileyo kwifayile yeparamitha ye-DSA.

@return Isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo esenziweyo kwifomethi ye-PEM, okanye NULL ukuba kwenzeke impazamo.
prompt_5_bt_segments_en: A function to execute a shell command and capture its result; the caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT perform this task as it will be provided later (but declare it here so you can use it).

Generate a private DSA key, output it using PEM format, and return it as a string.
Tips: execute shell commands to create a DSA parameter file and a private DSA key like this:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary parameter file> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary parameter file>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to generate a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated private DSA key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

prompt_en:
/**
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
*/
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
